name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench State Model

states.purpose: Initial state before any future workbench intake begins.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Artifact description or type context is insufficient for posture reasoning.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Artifact-subject separation boundary has been verified for future reasoning.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Source context has been recorded for posture reasoning.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Provenance gaps have been identified and constrain posture language.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Output boundary limits have been verified before any summary.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Available signals cannot support further structural description.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Governed posture summary may be produced under output boundary — not public publication.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state allows governed internal posture summary only. It does not authorize public output, publication, engine, scoring, verdict, or subject judgment.

states.purpose: Request must be refused under refusal model.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

states.purpose: Case exceeds governed automated posture reasoning scope.
states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

non_authorization_statement: This state model defines future workbench states only. It does not authorize interface, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public output.
